# Epics and Stories — Compliance Mix Fixture

> Fixture for VCP-RC-05. 5 GDPR stories, 3 PCI-DSS stories, 2 HIPAA
> stories spread across MVP and Post-MVP epics so the timeline-aggregator
> can be exercised independently of the priority/schedule conflict
> detector. Story counts are exact: any addition or removal must be
> reflected in the matching test assertion.

## Epic E-MIX-1 — MVP Privacy

- **Phase:** Phase 1 (MVP)

### Stories

- **MIX-1-1** — GDPR consent capture. Priority: P1. GDPR.
- **MIX-1-2** — GDPR data export. Priority: P1. GDPR.
- **MIX-1-3** — PCI-DSS card tokenization. Priority: P1. PCI-DSS.
- **MIX-1-4** — PCI DSS audit logging. Priority: P1. PCI DSS.

## Epic E-MIX-2 — Post-MVP Compliance Hardening

- **Phase:** Post-MVP

### Stories

- **MIX-2-1** — GDPR right-to-erasure. Priority: P1. GDPR.
- **MIX-2-2** — GDPR data subject access requests. Priority: P2. GDPR.
- **MIX-2-3** — GDPR processor agreements. Priority: P2. GDPR.
- **MIX-2-4** — PCI-DSS quarterly scan automation. Priority: P2. PCI-DSS.
- **MIX-2-5** — HIPAA business-associate agreement workflow. Priority: P2. HIPAA.
- **MIX-2-6** — HIPAA breach notification. Priority: P2. HIPAA.
